settings.title: Settings
settings.desc.theme: Specifies the color theme used in the workbench.
settings.desc.iconTheme: Specifies the file icon theme used in the workbench.
settings.desc.fontSize: Controls the font size in pixels.
settings.desc.autoSave: Controls auto save of dirty files.
settings.desc.displayLanguage: Controls the display language of the IDE.
settings.desc.formatOnPaste: Controls whether the editor should automatically format the pasted content.
settings.desc.cursorSmoothCaret: Controls whether the smooth caret animation should be enabled.
settings.desc.cursorWidth: Controls the width of the cursor.
settings.desc.minimapEnabled: Controls whether the minimap is shown.
settings.desc.minimapScale: Scale of content drawn in the minimap.
settings.desc.minimapMaxColumn: Limit the width of the minimap to a certain amount of columns.
settings.desc.minimapRenderChars: Render the actual characters on a line as opposed to color blocks.
settings.desc.suggestOnTriggerCharacters: Controls whether suggestions should automatically show up when typing trigger characters.
settings.desc.quickSuggestions: Controls whether suggestions should automatically show up while typing.
settings.desc.inlineSuggestions: Controls whether inline suggestions should be automatically shown in the editor.
settings.desc.acceptSuggestionOnEnter: Controls whether suggestions should be accepted on Enter, in addition to Tab.
settings.desc.codeFolding: Controls whether the editor has code folding enabled.
settings.desc.foldingStrategy: Controls the strategy for computing folding ranges.
settings.desc.showFoldingControls: Controls whether the folding controls on the gutter are automatically hidden.
settings.desc.autoCloseBrackets: Controls whether the editor should automatically close brackets after the user adds an opening bracket.
settings.desc.bracketPairColorization: Controls whether bracket pair colorization is enabled or not.
settings.desc.bracketPairGuides: Controls whether bracket pair guides are enabled or not.
settings.desc.detectIndentation: Controls whether indent size and insert spaces are automatically detected.
settings.desc.autoIndent: Controls whether the editor should automatically adjust the indentation when users type, paste, move or indent lines.
settings.desc.wordWrapColumn: Controls the wrapping column of the editor.
settings.desc.multiCursorModifier: The modifier to be used to add multiple cursors with the mouse.
settings.desc.multiCursorPaste: Controls pasting when the line count of the pasted text matches the cursor count.
settings.desc.stickyScroll: Shows the nested scopes at the top of the viewport during scrolling.
settings.desc.stickyScrollMaxLines: Defines the maximum number of sticky lines to show.
settings.desc.diffEditorSideBySide: Controls whether the diff editor shows the diff side by side or inline.
settings.desc.diffEditorIgnoreWhitespace: Controls whether the diff editor shows changes in leading or trailing whitespace as diffs.
settings.desc.editorPreviewMode: Controls whether editors are opened as preview editors.
settings.desc.editorTabCloseButton: Controls the position of the tab close buttons, or disables them.
settings.desc.editorOpenSideBySide: Controls whether editors should be opened in a new group to the side.
settings.desc.zenMode: Controls whether zen mode is enabled.
settings.desc.screencastMode: Controls whether screencast mode is enabled.
settings.desc.activityBarVisible: Controls the visibility of the activity bar in the workbench.
settings.desc.statusBarVisible: Controls the visibility of the status bar at the bottom of the workbench.
settings.desc.restoreWindows: Controls how windows are being restored after a restart.
settings.desc.newWindowDimensions: Controls the dimensions of a new window.
settings.desc.zoomLevel: Adjust the zoom level of the window.
settings.section.title: Window Title
settings.desc.titleBarStyle: Adjust the appearance of the window title bar.
settings.desc.menuBarVisibility: Control the visibility of the menu bar.
settings.desc.terminalFontSize: Controls the font size in pixels of the terminal.
settings.desc.terminalFontFamily: Controls the font family of the terminal.
settings.desc.terminalCursorBlinking: Controls whether the terminal cursor blinks.
settings.desc.terminalCursorStyle: Controls the style of the terminal cursor.
settings.desc.terminalDefaultProfile: The default terminal profile on Windows.
settings.desc.terminalScrollback: Controls the maximum amount of lines the terminal keeps in its buffer.
settings.desc.explorerAutoReveal: Controls whether the explorer should automatically reveal and select files when opening them.
settings.desc.explorerSortOrder: Controls sorting order of files and folders in the explorer.
settings.desc.explorerCompactFolders: Controls whether the explorer should render folders in a compact form.
settings.desc.searchExcludePattern: Configure glob patterns for excluding files and folders in searches.
settings.desc.searchUseIgnoreFiles: Controls whether to use .gitignore and .ignore files when searching for files.
settings.desc.searchSmartCase: Search case-insensitively if the pattern is all lowercase, otherwise, search case-sensitively.
settings.desc.debugOpenOnStart: Controls when the debug view should open.
settings.desc.debugInlineValues: Show variable values inline in editor while debugging.
settings.desc.debugToolBarLocation: Controls the location of the debug toolbar.
settings.desc.scmAutoFetch: Controls whether to automatically fetch from the default remote.
settings.desc.scmAutoRefresh: Controls whether to automatically refresh the SCM view.
settings.desc.scmDiffDecorations: Controls whether to show diff decorations in the editor.
settings.desc.problemsAutoReveal: Controls whether the problems view should automatically reveal the first problem.
settings.desc.problemsShowCurrentOnly: Controls whether the problems view should only show problems from the current file.
settings.desc.taskAutoDetect: Controls whether tasks should be automatically detected.
settings.desc.aiModel: Select the LLM model to use for code completion and chat.
settings.desc.aiModelError: Failed to fetch models from Ollama.
settings.desc.aiTemperature: Controls the creativity of the AI response.
settings.desc.aiContextWindow: Maximum number of tokens to include in the conversation history.
settings.desc.contextualAwareness: Enables the AI to understand the context of your project.
settings.desc.streamingResponse: Whether the AI responses should be streamed to the UI.
settings.desc.aiSafetyMode: Enables additional safety filters for AI responses.
settings.desc.ollamaEndpoint: The URL of your local Ollama server.
settings.desc.pullModelWarning: Downloading large models may take several minutes depending on your internet speed.
settings.desc.autoUpdate: Controls whether the IDE should automatically check for and install updates.
welcome.action.openFolderDesc: Open a local folder to start working
welcome.action.newFileDesc: Create a new file in your workspace
welcome.title: Welcome to OLLAMA AI
welcome.subtitle: A powerful, local-first IDE with integrated AI assistance
welcome.proTip: Pro Tip: Use the Command Palette
welcome.proTipDesc: Press Ctrl+Shift+P to quickly access any feature or setting in the IDE.
